summary: Good show with a lively crowd but no recording details; memorable for the bottle incident that ended the performance early
review: The concert was enjoyed by the reviewer, who notes a great time despite not having floor seats and mentions an abrupt end when Billy was struck with a bottle, resulting in no encore. No specific comments about the audio source or sound quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderately positive (4‑star) review; shows enthusiasm for the performance but offers no insight into recording quality, leading to a cautious rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic and enjoyable set that was cut short by an incident with a bottle; no encore performed.
